{{Quote|Today you are truly the hunter, and all else is your prey. Welcome to the Great Hunt.|Lek|<ref name="TOR:TM">{{TORcite|type=class|Bounty Hunter|The Melee|Dromund Kaas}}</ref>}}
'''Lek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the assistant Huntmaster in the [[Great Hunt (competition)|Great Hunt]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].

In [[3643 BBY]],<ref name="TOR_dates">{{TOR_dates|1}}</ref> Lek and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Huntmaster (Wookiee)|Huntmaster]] oversaw the organization of the [[Great Hunt (c. 3643 BBY)|competition]] from the [[Mandalorian enclave]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]],<ref name="Huntmaster" /> and Lek organized the preliminary competition amongst the dozen [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] who sought to secure the final spot in the Great Hunt.<ref name="TOR:TM" />
{{Char-stub}}
